description.p: A devilishily explosive technique.

sheet.description: You can make your body into a deadly bomb.

description.p: Starting at 1st level, you can make any part of you a deadly bomb. You spend cursed energy to remove and throw your body parts. You remove the part as described below. Throwing takes an action:

tr.td: You throw the body part at a point within 120ft. Creatures within 5 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd6 force damage. On a success, they take half.
You throw the body part at a point within 100ft. Creatures within 10 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd8 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success they take half.
You throw the body part at a point within 80ft. Creatures within 15 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd10 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half.
You throw the body part at a point within 60ft. Creatures within 20 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd12 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half.

description.p: After using a limb or body part in an explosion, it will be considered removed (Con mod is treated as min of 1).
The X is your CE modifier. Damage from this technique deals twice as much damage to objects and structures.

sheet.description: You can spend cursed energy to remove and throw your body parts. Damage from this technique deals twice as much damage to objects and structures.

description.p: Cost: 1 CE + Con mod HP
Action: Free Action
Effect: You throw the body part at a point within 120ft. Creatures within 5 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd6 force damage. On a success, they take half.

sheet.description: For 1 cursed energy + {{constitution:modifier}} HP, you throw the body part at a point within 120ft. Creatures within 5 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take {{ce:modifier}}d6 force damage. On a success, they take half.

description.p: Cost: 2 CE + (Con mod*half your level) HP
Action: Bonus Action
Effect: You throw the body part at a point within 100ft. Creatures within 10 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd8 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success they take half.

sheet.description: For 2 cursed energy + ({{constitution:modifier}}*{{level:half}}) HP, you throw the body part at a point within 100ft. Creatures within 10 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take {{ce:modifier}}d8 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success they take half.

description.p: Cost: 4 CE + (Con mod*level) HP
Action: Action
Effect: You throw the body part at a point within 80ft. Creatures within 15 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd10 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half.

sheet.description: For 4 cursed energy + ({{constitution:modifier}}*{{level}}) HP, you throw the body part at a point within 80ft. Creatures within 15 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take {{ce:modifier}}d10 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half.

description.p: Cost: 6 CE + (Con mod*level) HP
Action: Full Turn Action
Effect: You throw the body part at a point within 60ft. Creatures within 20 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take Xd12 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half.

sheet.description: For 6 cursed energy + ({{constitution:modifier}}*{{level}}) HP, you throw the body part at a point within 60ft. Creatures within 20 ft make a Dex save. On a failure, they take {{ce:modifier}}d12 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half.

description.p: At 3rd level, you have gained more expertise over your technique, and can now throw your bombs faster. You can now throw a body part as an action or bonus action.

sheet.description: You can now throw a body part as an action or bonus action.

description.p: At 6th level, your practice with your explosions allowed you to make them in an instant. You can now instantly explode one of your body parts for the normal cost, as a reaction to receiving or hitting a melee attack roll as the body part explodes on your body. All creatures make the Dexterity saving throw with disadvantage unless their passive perception is higher than your cursed energy DC.

sheet.description: As a reaction to receiving or hitting a melee attack roll explode a body part for the normal cost. All creatures make the Dexterity saving throw with disadvantage unless their passive perception is higher than {{ce:dc:total}}.

description.p: At 11th level, with the extensive use of your technique, your explosions became deadlier. When a creature fails the saving throw of your explosions, they gain the deafened condition for 1 minute. They can make a Constitution saving throw at the beginning of their turns, ending the condition early on a success. Also, your explosions deal three times as much damage to objects and structures and their explosion range is increased by 5ft.
At 18th level, the creature also gains the blinded condition.

sheet.description: When a creature fails the saving throw of your explosions, they gain the deafened condition for 1 minute. They can make a Constitution saving throw at the beginning of their turns, ending the condition early on a success. Also, your explosions deal three times as much damage to objects and structures and their explosion range is increased by 5ft.

When a creature fails the saving throw of your explosions, they gain the deafened and blinded conditions for 1 minute. They can make a Constitution saving throw at the beginning of their turns, ending the condition early on a success. Also, your explosions deal three times as much damage to objects and structures and their explosion range is increased by 5ft.

description.p: At 18th level, you have mastered your technique, allowing you to expand your domain. You can detonate any of your body parts for no CE cost. At initiative 20, you can choose a limb from a creature inside your domain and detonate it.

sheet.description: For 20 cursed energy, you can detonate any of your body parts for no CE cost. At initiative 20, you can choose a limb from a creature inside your domain and detonate it.
